specific_location: 1200 Stover Street; half way between Mulberry & Prospect, and College and Lemay
description: Eye line very conspicuous even in dense shade under blue spruce tree where bird first seen; breast band could be seen well; all diagnostic field marks, including slender bill, seen well with 6x35 binoculars when bird moved into sun; photographed with 10x Kodak digital camera.Behaviors: Feeding on ground, perhaps on cracked corn and sunflower hearts; watering at snow level heated bath; sunning in chokecherry tree.Call: Not heardPlumage: Male
